steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The colon introduces an elaboration: the source “has no direct bearing on whether the claim is true.” This explicitly defines what the blank should express.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Irrelevant directly expresses the meaning needed—source is unrelated to the validity of what's claimed.

The other choices refer to clarity (indistinct), certainty (indisputable), or unstated meaning (implicit), none of which capture this disconnect.

B is correct.
